title: Widening the pull — halo, prism, ember
prompt: Round 2: expanding the directions you selected. Alpha's warmth and Beta's arc each get room; the Alpha × Gamma remix lands as Ember.

options.label: Halo Bloom
options.description: Alpha's warmth abstracted into concentric rings of light.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="12" fill="#f59e0b"/><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="24" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="4" opacity="0.8"/><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="36" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/></svg>

options.label: Prism Break
options.description: Beta's breakout arc refracted through a triangular prism.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 18L82 74H18z" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M14 50h22M64 40l24-10M64 60l24 10" stroke="#2dd4bf" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>

options.label: Ember Strata
options.description: Remix: Gamma's layers heated by Alpha's filament glow.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M22 62l28 12 28-12" fill="none" stroke="#7c3aed" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M22 46l28 12 28-12" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="5"/><circle cx="50" cy="32" r="10" fill="#f59e0b"/></svg>

survey.elaborationPrompt: Which expansion earns a deeper cut?
